scheduling_decisions: Place T1 (preconditions) as UOW-001 and run first to avoid wasted work
Serialize implementation (T3) to minimize coordination overhead
Run T4 (wiring) before test/build verification to reduce flakiness
Parallelize T5 and T6 as batch 5 with coordination constraints

risk_assessment.risk_reason: Missing required files block all downstream work
risk_assessment.mitigation: T1 must halt further implementation batches if files missing

risk_assessment.risk_reason: Implementation touches multiple areas (component, template, harness)
risk_assessment.mitigation: Keep implementation in one focused batch; document adjacent edits in impl_report
Run T4 first; capture CLI outputs and attach to impl_report

execution_blockers.blocker: Missing target implementation files referenced by ACs
execution_blockers.resolution: T1 will detect and emit impl_report with filesystem evidence; downstream tasks paused
T1 will clarify path resolution and record exact absolute paths in artifact_schema.yaml
